description: Beijing time-of-use (TOU) time blocks (peak/flat/valley/super_peak) for a generic day
notes: Super-peak blocks override base blocks when overlapping.

description: TOU multipliers relative to flat period (per tariff type) incl. super_peak=peak*1.2
notes: Use with schedule to generate per-timestep prices from a configurable flat/base price.

description: State Grid Beijing proxy purchase industrial/commercial price table PDF (Feb 2024)
notes: Used to extract representative flat/base prices in CNY/kWh.

description: Extracted flat/base electricity prices (CNY/kWh) from State Grid Beijing proxy purchase table (Feb 2024)
notes: Use together with TOU schedule+multipliers to build `price_e` time series.

description: Non-residential pipeline natural gas prices (CNY/m3) for the 2024-11-15~2025-03-15 uplift period and restored prices from 2025-03-16
notes: Includes power generation/heating-cooling/industrial-commercial and CNG station non-residential price.

description: Gas power plant heat ex-factory price (CNY/GJ) for the same periods
notes: Can be used as an alternative proxy for heat value.

description: Beijing ETS reference price (CNY/tCO2) for default carbon_tax
source_document_id: 北京市生态环境局信息(2025-05-15)
notes: Uses reported 2024 online average transaction price.
